title: Urination SMP Modpack
description: Modpack for use on the Urination SMP
body:
# Modpack for players in the Urination SMP!

## This modpack is made in order to unify the multiplayer experience to help stream content, player interaction, and general quality of life features.

The main mods are as follows:

- Contact: A mod used to contact other players on the world, especially useful for content creators looking to engage with their chat.
- Simple Voice Chat: A mod used for proximity chat.
- ViveCraft: A mod used for VR support.
- Universal Bone Meal: Mod used so players do not have to tear the world apart for loot.
